originContent: # Starter Kit: Software Development Project with TurboRepo
translatedContent: # Starter Kit: Software Development Project with TurboRepo

originContent: This repository serves as a ready-to-use toolkit and project skeleton that enables a swift start in building innovative software applications. It leverages advanced technologies and frameworks like TurboRepo, NestJS, Vue 3 with Vite, TypeScript, and Nuxt.js to facilitate seamless and efficient software development.
translatedContent: This repository serves as a ready-to-use toolkit and project skeleton that enables a swift start in building innovative software applications. It leverages advanced technologies and frameworks like TurboRepo, NestJS, Vue 3 with Vite, TypeScript, and Nuxt.js to facilitate seamless and efficient software development.

originContent: - **TurboRepo**: The repository is configured to work with TurboRepo – a tool that simplifies the management of multiple interconnected repositories within a single project. This allows you to focus on feature development while TurboRepo handles organization.
translatedContent: - **TurboRepo**: The repository is configured to work with TurboRepo – a tool that simplifies the management of multiple interconnected repositories within a single project. This allows you to focus on feature development while TurboRepo handles organization.

originContent: - **NestJS**: The backend of the application is built on NestJS, a Node.js-based framework that enables the creation of scalable and modular APIs. Fully integrated with TypeScript, NestJS offers performance and readable code.
translatedContent: - **NestJS**: The backend of the application is built on NestJS, a Node.js-based framework that enables the creation of scalable and modular APIs. Fully integrated with TypeScript, NestJS offers performance and readable code.

originContent: - **Vue 3 + Vite**: The user interface is based on Vue 3, the latest version of the popular JavaScript framework. We also use Vite, a fast and modern tool for building user interfaces.
translatedContent: - **Vue 3 + Vite**: The user interface is based on Vue 3, the latest version of the popular JavaScript framework. We also use Vite, a fast and modern tool for building user interfaces.

originContent: - **TypeScript**: The entire project is written in TypeScript, enhancing code safety and facilitating refactoring and maintenance.
translatedContent: - **TypeScript**: The entire project is written in TypeScript, enhancing code safety and facilitating refactoring and maintenance.

originContent: - **Nuxt.js**: The repository also includes a sample configuration for Nuxt.js, a framework for creating Vue.js SSR (Server-Side Rendering) applications. This ensures SEO performance and fast content loading.
translatedContent: - **Nuxt.js**: The repository also includes a sample configuration for Nuxt.js, a framework for creating Vue.js SSR (Server-Side Rendering) applications. This ensures SEO performance and fast content loading.

originContent: - **Electron**: The project can also be packaged as a desktop application using Electron, allowing you to create cross-platform applications.
translatedContent: - **Electron**: The project can also be packaged as a desktop application using Electron, allowing you to create cross-platform applications.

originContent: - **Capacitor**: Capacitor is integrated to enable building native mobile apps using web technologies.
translatedContent: - **Capacitor**: Capacitor is integrated to enable building native mobile apps using web technologies.

originContent: - **Docker**: Docker is utilized to containerize and manage application deployment.
translatedContent: - **Docker**: Docker is utilized to containerize and manage application deployment.

originContent: - **Shared Package**: The repository incorporates a shared package to enhance code reusability and maintainability.
translatedContent: - **Shared Package**: The repository incorporates a shared package to enhance code reusability and maintainability.

originContent: - **Test Configuration with Vitest and Jest**: The repository includes a pre-configured setup for testing using Vitest and Jest. You can easily write and run unit tests for your Vue components and TypeScript code. Simply utilize the provided test configuration and harness the power of Vitest's rapid testing capabilities along with Jest's robust testing framework.
translatedContent: - **Test Configuration with Vitest and Jest**: The repository includes a pre-configured setup for testing using Vitest and Jest. You can easily write and run unit tests for your Vue components and TypeScript code. Simply utilize the provided test configuration and harness the power of Vitest's rapid testing capabilities along with Jest's robust testing framework.

originContent: ## Volar and Visual Studio Code (Takeover Mode)
translatedContent: ## Volar and Visual Studio Code (Takeover Mode)

originContent: `Volar` is now `Vue - Official` extension so, takeover mode is no longer needed in version 2.0. Please enable built-in `TypeScript and JavaScript Language Features` extension, if you was disable this extension before.
translatedContent: `Volar` is now the `Vue - Official` extension, so takeover mode is no longer needed in version 2.0. Please enable the built-in `TypeScript and JavaScript Language Features` extension if you had disabled this extension before.

originContent: * `dev` - run all applications simultaneously with hot reload
translatedContent: * `dev` - run all applications simultaneously with hot reload

originContent: * `dev-api` - run API project with hot reload
translatedContent: * `dev-api` - run API project with hot reload

originContent: * `dev-web` - run WEB project with hot reload
translatedContent: * `dev-web` - run WEB project with hot reload

originContent: * `dev-web-electron` - run WEB project in electron application with hot reload
translatedContent: * `dev-web-electron` - run WEB project in electron application with hot reload

originContent: * `dev-nuxt` - run nuxt application with hot reload
translatedContent: * `dev-nuxt` - run nuxt application with hot reload

originContent: * `dev-mobile` - run mobile application with hot reload
translatedContent: * `dev-mobile` - run mobile application with hot reload

originContent: * `build-web-electron` - build electron application with web project
translatedContent: * `build-web-electron` - build electron application with web project

originContent: * `start-web` - boot up a local static web server that serves the files from dist
translatedContent: * `start-web` - boot up a local static web server that serves the files from dist

originContent: * `mobile-android` - build mobile application and open in Android Studio
translatedContent: * `mobile-android` - build mobile application and open in Android Studio

originContent: * `mobile-ios` - build mobile application and open in Xcode
translatedContent: * `mobile-ios` - build mobile application and open in Xcode

originContent: * `test` - run tests for all packages and applications
translatedContent: * `test` - run tests for all packages and applications

originContent: * `clean` - remove dist directory from all packages and applications
translatedContent: * `clean` - remove dist directory from all packages and applications

originContent: * `mikestead.dotenv` - DotENV - Support for dotenv file syntax
translatedContent: * `mikestead.dotenv` - DotENV - Support for dotenv file syntax

originContent: If you find a bug, or have an enhancement in mind please post [issues](https://github.com/DhivinX/turbo-starter/issues) on GitHub.
translatedContent: If you find a bug, or have an enhancement in mind please post [issues](https://github.com/DhivinX/turbo-starter/issues) on GitHub.

originContent: If you have ideas for enhancing this starter or want to add new features, feel free to submit pull requests. Your contribution can help other developers kickstart their projects even faster!
translatedContent: If you have ideas for enhancing this starter or want to add new features, feel free to submit pull requests. Your contribution can help other developers kickstart their projects even faster!

translatedContent: This starter kit is provided under the MIT license.
